violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit low boy doors. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

The door to the toilet room was observed open during the time of inspection. The toilet room door was observed to remain open and held against the floor if pushed too far. Establishment is to adjust the door so that it can be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
The floor grout in the kitchen/ food preparation area was observed to be low and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2026

The coving tiles in the preparation area by the prep unit and behind the prep table were observed loose or missing and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply to have a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was above 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Water was added to dilute the sanitizing solution at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The wall behind the 3-bay sink has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 Bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment must clean the wall behind the three bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (Grout low or missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by June 27 2024 The door to the outside is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2024
